name: Poland

name: Nekonia
startIntroPart1: May the stars shine upon you, playful Hikari-nyan, leader of Nekonia! Born from the softest clouds and the fluffiest yarn, Nekonia is a land where catgirls frolic, kittens purr, and every corner is a cozy playground. Your people thrive on curiosity, joy, and the endless pursuit of happiness.
startIntroPart2: Great Hikari-nyan, the world awaits your cheerful pawsteps. Will you spread joy, laughter, and yarn-filled wonders across the lands, building a peaceful empire that everyone adores?
declaringWar: Nyaa! I will swat you if you dare attack!
attacked: Huh? That hurt, but I won't get too grumpy!
defeated: Nyaa… perhaps my nap will last longer now.
introduction: Hello! Are you a friend or a snack?
tradeRequest: Do you have a shiny yarn ball for me?
uniques: Free [Great Artist] appears <upon discovering [Drama and Poetry] technology>
